mapper.select: SELECT step_order as stepOrder, step_name as stepName, status, approver_name as approverName, comment, operate_time as operateTime FROM approval_step WHERE batch_id=#{batchId} ORDER BY step_order
mapper.update: UPDATE approval_step SET status=#{status}, approver_name=#{approverName}, comment=#{comment}, operate_time=NOW() WHERE batch_id=#{batchId} AND step_order=#{stepOrder}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM approval_history WHERE batch_id=#{batchId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT * FROM plan_change WHERE batch_id=#{batchId} ORDER BY apply_time DESC
SELECT submit_by, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM approval_history GROUP BY submit_by ORDER BY cnt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_change (change_id, batch_id, change_type, change_type_name, reason, change_data, approval_status, approval_status_name, apply_time) VALUES (#{changeId}, #{batchId}, #{changeType}, #{changeTypeName}, #{reason}, #{changeData}, 1, '待确认', NOW())
INSERT INTO approval_step (batch_id, step_order, step_name, status, approver_name, comment, operate_time) VALUES (#{batchId}, #{stepOrder}, #{stepName}, #{status}, #{approverName}, #{comment}, NOW())
INSERT INTO approval_history (approval_id, batch_id, flow_type, status, submit_by, submit_time, result) VALUES (#{approvalId}, #{batchId}, 'NEW_PLAN', '进行中', #{submitBy}, NOW(), #{result})
mapper.update: UPDATE plan_change SET approval_status=0, approval_status_name='已确认' WHERE change_id=#{changeId}
